response:
You must solve the math problem about the 11-digit number.
***
The number must be divisible by both three and four.
***
Digits from the set zero two four seven eight nine are allowed.
***
We calculate the sum of digits to check divisibility by three.
***
The last two digits determine if the number is divisible by four.
***
No two adjacent words in this text start with consecutive letters.
***
There are no exclamation marks used anywhere in this entire response.
***
The total count of valid ways is found by multiplying options.
